description: Governed detail schema contract. Defines the structure of canonical detail logic definitions: required fields, valid component roles, valid relationship types, and valid parameter inputs. Runtime consumes this schema and does not define it.
fail_closed_rule: A detail must not be emitted if required components are undefined, required relationships are unresolved, material references point to undefined classes, parameter inputs cannot be resolved, or preconditions are not satisfied.
canonical_detail_logic_rule: A detail family must be represented by one canonical logic definition unless a true logic change is required. Parameter variation alone does not create new definitions.
